name: Joe Biden 2020
subject: this news nearly made me spit out my coffee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
It's really important that we can get our own ads up in response. |
---
In a minute, I'm going to ask you to chip in $5. [**But first, let me explain why >>**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.08_B3_pb-trumpads_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.08_B3_pb-trumpads_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS")

I spend every day monitoring Donald Trump's ad spending. And when I saw he already reserved $90 million worth of ads for this fall, I nearly spit out my coffee.

You see, we weren't expecting him to make an aggressive buy so early. Now, I'm scrambling to get a budget approved so we can match his.

In this virtual world especially, getting (and keeping) our own ads up on TV has never been more important.

Peter, it would be really helpful to me if you chipped in $5 to this email. I'm finalizing our fall ads budget as we speak, and knowing we have your $5 would make me feel a lot better. **Can I count on your help?** | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Unfortunately for myself, I spend most days watching the ads Trump and his team produce. And let me tell you, Peter, they are filled with nothing but lies and smears against Joe Biden.

So, take it from me -- it's really important that we can get our own ads up in response.

But we can't do it without your help. 97% of all donations to this campaign are from grassroots supporters like you. Believe me when I say your donations would be a huge help to our ads budget.

[**Will you chip in $5 today?**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.08_B3_pb-trumpads_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.08_B3_pb-trumpads_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS")

[**https://go.joebiden.com/Donate**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.08_B3_pb-trumpads_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.08_B3_pb-trumpads_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS")

Thank you so much for your help,

Patrick Bonsignore
Director of Paid Media
Biden for President

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf96/1cd0ac28/8cb95a50/357c3b00/4258296607/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf96/1cd0ac28/8cb95a50/357c3bff/4258296607/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf96/1cd0ac28/8cb95a50/357c3bfe/4258296607/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf96/1cd0ac28/8cb95a50/357c3bfd/4258296607/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf96/1cd0ac28/8cb95a50/357c3bfc/4258296607/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf96/1cd0ac28/8cb95a50/357c3bfb/4258296607/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf96/1cd0ac28/8cb95a50/357c3bfe/4258296607/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf96/1cd0ac28/8cb95a50/357c3bfa/4258296607/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf96/1cd0ac28/8cb95a50/357c3bfd/4258296607/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf96/1cd0ac28/8cb95a50/357c3bf9/4258296607/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: me, MJ Hegar
subject: Tomorrow's the day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489013a/7f51f7bc/41d62d9b/4ef663f8/2470975689/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

I can't believe the runoff is finally almost here! We've got a big day tomorrow, so I wanted to reach out one more time.

I can't begin to tell you how important it is that we keep reaching voters all throughout the day tomorrow -- we _have_ to do everything we can to make sure every undecided voter hears about our campaign before they cast their ballots. [**Can I count on you to help us through this last push of the runoff election?**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489013a/7f51f7bc/41d62d9b/4ef663ff/2470975689/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MDEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffads?refcode=email_20200713.4nd__1701__&amount=10")

After tomorrow, we need to be prepared to move full steam ahead into the general. I hope I can count on you, Peter. So help me out, and then let's go win this! \-- MJ P.S. Election day is tomorrow! If you're in Texas, you can find everything you need to vote safely **[here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489013a/7f51f7bc/41d62d9b/4ef663fe/2470975689/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://mjfortexas.com/voting/")**.
\---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **Taylor, MJ Hegar HQ**
Subject: Will you make the difference?
> | **500 NEW DONOR GOAL
> RUNOFF: TOMORROW
> STILL TO GO: 12 NEW DONORS FROM YOUR AREA**
>
> **[PITCH IN](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489013a/7f51f7bc/41d62d9b/4ef663ff/2470975689/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MDEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffads?refcode=email_20200713.4nd__1701__&amount=10")**
> ---
> Hey Peter -- the runoff election is TOMORROW, and we're SO CLOSE to reaching our 500 new donor, but we aren't there yet.
>
> I broke it down, and if 12 new donors join the team from your area, we can reach our goal and keep our ads running through election night!
>
> **[What do you say? Will you pitch in now to help us keep our ads up and keep on reaching key undecided Texans?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489013a/7f51f7bc/41d62d9b/4ef663ff/2470975689/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MDEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffads?refcode=email_20200713.4nd__1701__&amount=10")**
>
> We need to nominate the best candidate to take on Sen. Cornyn -- and that's MJ.
> _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
> ---
> **[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489013a/7f51f7bc/41d62d9b/4ef663fd/2470975689/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MDEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffads?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200713.4nd__1701__&amount=5")**
> **[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489013a/7f51f7bc/41d62d9b/4ef663fc/2470975689/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MDEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffads?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200713.4nd__1701__&amount=10")**
> **[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489013a/7f51f7bc/41d62d9b/4ef663f3/2470975689/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MDEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffads?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200713.4nd__1701__&amount=25")**
> **[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489013a/7f51f7bc/41d62d9b/4ef663f2/2470975689/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MDEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffads?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200713.4nd__1701__&amount=50")**
> **[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489013a/7f51f7bc/41d62d9b/4ef663f1/2470975689/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MDEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffads?refcode=email_20200713.4nd__1701__")**
> Taylor Klos
> Texas Finance Director
> MJ for Texas
>
>
>
>
> **[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489013a/7f51f7bc/41d62d9b/4ef663ff/2470975689/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MDEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffads?refcode=email_20200713.4nd__1701__&amount=10")**

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489013a/7f51f7bc/41d62d9b/4ef663f0/2470975689/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MDEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1701&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489013a/7f51f7bc/41d62d9b/4ef663f7/2470975689/VEsHBg/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny 7/13
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
[](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkihllkl-olhhkyhhid-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| Friends, With Early Voting starting on Friday and Election Day drawing nearer, Team Manny has gained incredible momentum. The support I have received has been overwhelming. But now is not the time to slow down. I would appreciate it if you would call 10 people and tell them about our movement. I need each and every one of you with me on August 6. Let's win this thing! Once again, I spent time in all three Grand Divisions this week, particularly in East Tennessee. I enjoyed spending time in Williamson, Rutherford, Morgan, Anderson, Scott, Blount, Loudon, Shelby, Washington, Unicoi, Greene, and Maury Counties. I hope you'll join me at one of our next townhalls near you. Folks, we have pulled within 4 points of our opponent. According to an external poll conducted by the Trafalgar Group, I am in a statistical dead heat with the Ambassador. Our movement is resonating with Tennesseans all across the state and we aren't slowing down. Help keep our momentum going by calling 10 people and telling them about our movement! [](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkihllkl-olhhkyhhid-j/) I hope you'll join my friend, Sen. Rand Paul and myself this Saturday, July 18th. name: Tina Ramirez
subject: 2020 Convention SATURDAY
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TINA RAMIREZ, INC
body:
Details Inside 📩
|
---
| | |
---
---
| |
---
---
[](https://tinaramirez.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkihidtt-udthdyhkil-i/)
| | | Friend, **Our Seventh District Republican Convention is _THIS SATURDAY_ , starting at 8 AM at the Meadow Event Park! ** _**Please read the memo below on when to arrive, what to bring and what to expect**_ : Among other amenities, my campaign has booked out the lobby of a nearby hotel – The Country Inn & Suites (16250 International St, Doswell 23047) – where there will be AC and a room for people who need it. We will provide continuous transport between the hotel and the convention site all day, and we are committed to keeping you cool, safe and comfortable for the whole process. This is a walk-in convention with up to 3 rounds of voting. We will walk into the Farm Bureau building to vote and stay outside when not voting. In between rounds, the Tina Ramirez Campaign is committed to keeping you cool, safe, and comfortable. **TIMELINE**
* 7 AM: Breakfast with Tina at the Country Inn & Suites Hotel
* 8-11 AM: The first round of voting & registration
* Delegates arriving after 11 AM will NOT be credentialed and CANNOT vote
* So plan to arrive no later than 9:30 AM, to allow for parking/traffic difficulties.
* 11 AM – Nomination: After the first round of voting, delegates will wait outside while the ballots are counted. It may take up to 2 more rounds to nominate a candidate, so voting will probably finish by mid-late afternoon.

**WHAT TO BRING**
* Identification (required to vote)
* Facemask (highly recommended)
* Your cell phone (so we can reach you and give updates throughout the day)
* Chairs/tents/umbrellas (optional)
* Sunscreen (optional)
* Snacks/water (optional)

**AMENITIES** While outside, Tina’s campaign is prepared to provide:
* Refreshments
* Big tents (on-site) to get out of the sun and relax
* Entertainment
* A hotel lobby (down the road) with AC
* Transportation to and from the hotel

**ON-SITE, THERE WILL ALSO BE:**
* Restrooms
* Food for purchase
* Parking (a short walk from the Farm Bureau building)

**FAQ**
* Is there curbside/drive-through voting?_Unfortunately, no – not at this time._
* Can I vote without an ID? _No. You need to bring a photo-ID._
* Can I send a proxy to vote in my place? _Unfortunately, no – only credentialed delegates who are present may vote._
* Can I come for just the first round, or leave and then come back? _Yes! And the more rounds you are present to vote for Tina, the more likely Tina is to win._
* Can a non-delegate come with me? _Yes, they just can’t vote._
* Can I volunteer for Tina at the convention? _YES! Call Sarah Ball at 804-539-7040._
* What exit do I take from I-95? _Take Exit 98 and drive East on Route 30. The Farm Bureau building will be on the Left. Address is 13191 Dawn Blvd, Doswell, VA 23047._

__**IF YOU HAVE QUESTIONS, PLEASE CALL ADDISON AT 540-212-9417. THANK YOU!**__
---
---
[](https://tinaramirez.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkihidtt-udthdyhkil-d/)
---
**[Website](https://tinaramirez.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkihidtt-udthdyhkil-h/) | [Facebook](https://tinaramirez.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkihidtt-udthdyhkil-k/) | [Twitter](https://tinaramirez.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkihidtt-udthdyhkil-u/) | [Instagram](https://tinaramirez.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkihidtt-udthdyhkil-o/) | **[**Donate**](https://tinaramirez.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkihidtt-udthdyhkil-b/)
**PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TINA RAMIREZ, INC.**

| Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. _We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us._

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. name: Betsy R.
subject: If you care about women's rights, you gotta see this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
**_I am so proud to stand with Planned Parenthood_** and to have received their endorsement for State Senate. Planned Parenthood provides critical healthcare for millions of men and women across the country-not only reproductive health, but STD testing and treatment, cancer screening, infertility services, and more. I, and millions of others, know the important work that Planned Parenthood provides and I will continue to fight for reproductive rights as a State Senator, unlike my opponent. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/AlPBIkDfhlv_9R8cChsn4yjx6KX_GUZTkAPdu_4OZDQ=/q8eATrnIKZw40CDAajJ73Gixf1l4UlA_u9kQ8V2hQy0=?refcode=PP7.14&amount=25) **I stand in stark opposition to my opponent, who is the Board Chair of the Cleveland Right to Life and remains active in their fight to dismantle reproductive rights. **
* Under his leadership, the chapter expanded their mission to fight LGBTQ rights, and his chapter was **disaffiliated ** by the National Right to Life.
* As County Commissioner, he praised a bill passed in the Ohio legislature that would have **charged abortion providers with murder.**
* A month ago, **he ****advocated for Ohio to shut down abortions clinics during the pandemic **despite a federal court ruling them essential.
* Just last week, he said the democrat party was full of** white liberals who "worship at the altar of abortion."**
* Most importantly, he openly states that he chose to run for State Senate because **with only 33 state senators in Ohio, he has more influence.** He said, "the state is where the action is in terms of protecting life and protecting family values."

**Even amongst groups like Right to Life, let alone the majority of Americans and Ohians, he is too extreme. Legislating his minority opinion about women 's health is not how our democracy should work.** ** If you can, please make a donation in support of my race today, and show your support for this essential aspect of our healthcare - reproductive access for all. ** _Thanks so much for your support!_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/AlPBIkDfhlv_9R8cChsn4yjx6KX_GUZTkAPdu_4OZDQ=/q8eATrnIKZw40CDAajJ73Gixf1l4UlA_u9kQ8V2hQy0=?refcode=PP7.14) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/AlPBIkDfhlv_9R8cChsn4yjx6KX_GUZTkAPdu_4OZDQ=/ZCgMpHINrfopB-uphhYDOfOGFxPHRcX14hspYgTafnI=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/AlPBIkDfhlv_9R8cChsn4yjx6KX_GUZTkAPdu_4OZDQ=/DXJZKOpIQJpFUi0WPngym2iFDg8bEqlYkILb4zbBr7w=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/AlPBIkDfhlv_9R8cChsn4yjx6KX_GUZTkAPdu_4OZDQ=/0a080DWd6vo4ZS4CRk0DG6Nsfw8FZ7kwuVXIHknH0hQ=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/AlPBIkDfhlv_9R8cChsn4yjx6KX_GUZTkAPdu_4OZDQ=/TgBUaABeOGLqDYkw3ki83CjzREAGvI6xg0FIM3tprg8=)

clean_body: | | | | I am so proud to stand with Planned Parenthood and to have received their endorsement for State Senate. Planned Parenthood provides critical healthcare for millions of men and women across the country-not only reproductive health, but STD testing and treatment, cancer screening, infertility services, and more. I, and millions of others, know the important work that Planned Parenthood provides and I will continue to fight for reproductive rights as a State Senator, unlike my opponent. I stand in stark opposition to my opponent, who is the Board Chair of the Cleveland Right to Life and remains active in their fight to dismantle reproductive rights. Under his leadership, the chapter expanded their mission to fight LGBTQ rights, and his chapter was disaffiliated by the National Right to Life. As County Commissioner, he praised a bill passed in the Ohio legislature that would have charged abortion providers with murder. A month ago, he **advocated for Ohio to shut down abortions clinics during the pandemic despite a federal court ruling them essential. Just last week, he said the democrat party was full of white liberals who "worship at the altar of abortion." Most importantly, he openly states that he chose to run for State Senate because with only 33 state senators in Ohio, he has more influence. He said, "the state is where the action is in terms of protecting life and protecting family values." Even amongst groups like Right to Life, let alone the majority of Americans and Ohians, he is too extreme. Legislating his minority opinion about women 's health is not how our democracy should work. If you can, please make a donation in support of my race today, and show your support for this essential aspect of our healthcare - reproductive access for all. Thanks so much for your support! = = = = | Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader Friends of Betsy Rader PO Box 280 Novelty OH 44072 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =_

name: Dr. Rene Bollier
subject: Asking you personally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bollier for Kansas
body:
We all know Washington isn’t working for people in Kansas and around the country. We need to send problem solvers like Barbara to the Senate who will put politics aside and get things done.

|
---

| | Team, My wife Barbara became a doctor because she wanted to help people. Now, she’s running to be the first woman physician in the U.S. Senate for the same reason. [**I’m asking you personally, team -- will you own a piece of Barbara’s campaign with a $5 contribution before her pre-primary fundraising deadline?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18253191/222376122/476841977?refcode=em200714i&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTk3ZGI0My1mNWM1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=urqYQy5OYAvlibU8cll2G5b9KnhoJAZp7iXUZuYqh38=) We all know Washington isn’t working for people in Kansas and around the country. We need to send problem solvers like Barbara to the Senate who will put politics aside and get things done. That is who Barbara is and has always been. I know firsthand that she is the kind of person and leader that Kansans need advocating for our families and Kansas values in the U.S. Senate. I know that with your support, Barbara can win this race. That’s why I’m reaching out to ask if you can help her meet her $50,000 fundraising goal ahead of the FEC’s pre-primary deadline. [**Donate $5 -- or whatever you can -- to help my wife Barbara flip Kansas’ Senate seat.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18253192/222376123/476841977?refcode=em200714i&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTk3ZGI0My1mNWM1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=urqYQy5OYAvlibU8cll2G5b9KnhoJAZp7iXUZuYqh38=) Thank you, Dr. Rene Bollier **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18253193/222376124/476841977?refcode=em200714i&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTk3ZGI0My1mNWM1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=urqYQy5OYAvlibU8cll2G5b9KnhoJAZp7iXUZuYqh38=)**

name: MJ Hegar Senior Staff
subject: We have less than 12 hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
The runoff is today, and we have less than 12 hours to reach voters and make sure they're getting to the polls!

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890104/7f51f7bc/41eb3eaa/4ef663e3/925327090/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890104/7f51f7bc/41eb3eaa/4ef663e2/925327090/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MDkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffday?refcode=email_20200714.1nd__1709__&amount=10")
---
TODAY is the day, Peter! After two weeks of early voting, the runoff is officially here! If you're in Texas, and haven't voted yet, make sure you vote today! **[Click here for everything you'll need to cast your vote safely.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890104/7f51f7bc/41eb3eaa/4ef663e1/925327090/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://mjfortexas.com/voting")**

We're using every second to get out the vote and make sure MJ is the candidate who will take on Sen. Cornyn, starting _as soon_ as we get the nomination, but we can't do this alone! Over 56,000 donors have already pitched in to help us power this movement and take on Sen. Cornyn -- **[will you rush your first* donation today and join the team?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890104/7f51f7bc/41eb3eaa/4ef663e2/925327090/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MDkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffday?refcode=email_20200714.1nd__1709__&amount=10")**

Together, we'll get out the vote and DEFEAT Sen. Cornyn in November!
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890104/7f51f7bc/41eb3eaa/4ef663e2/925327090/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MDkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffday?refcode=email_20200714.1nd__1709__&amount=10")**

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890104/7f51f7bc/41eb3eaa/4ef663db/925327090/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MDkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1709&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890104/7f51f7bc/41eb3eaa/4ef663da/925327090/VEsHBw/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" \-- Team MJ If you've already contributed to the campaign, thank you so much! Our records are based on donations associated with this email address in our online database, which may take some time to update. "" | | It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. "" However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, ""**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time. MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard. MJ for Texas P.O. name: Bruce, Warner Campaign Manager
subject: about November elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

Election Day is going to look different this year.

We had record turnout for the presidential primary on Super Tuesday, but since then the world has changed. Folks in the Commonwealth and across the country are rightfully concerned about the coronavirus pandemic and the long lines we've already seen to vote in person in primary elections.

While Mark Warner does his job in the Senate to make sure our elections are free of foreign interference and pushes to make sure that people across the country have access to early voting and vote-by-mail, Team Warner is working hard to get the word out about how to vote safely in November. **[Will you support our voter registration and turnout efforts?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbcc/53d9897e/5442680b/1c885130/2654331662/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY1MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-turnoutefforts?refcode=20200714_f_1_nd__651__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Our team is running voter registration trainings with folks across the Commonwealth, educating folks on how to check their registration status and request their absentee ballot, and making sure that people know their options as we head toward Election Day. Whether folks choose to vote by mail, vote early in person, or vote on Election Day, we want to make sure every Virginian is empowered to safely cast their ballot.

**No one should have to choose between their health and casting their ballot, nor should they have to wait hours to vote.**

It seems like we're a ways off, but November is right around the corner. Especially with increased health and safety precautions, it's critical that we start the work to get folks registered and ready to vote. We could really use your support -- **[are you in?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbcc/53d9897e/5442680b/1c88513f/2654331662/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY1MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-turnoutefforts?refcode=20200714_f_1_nd__651__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thank you for your support.

-- Bruce, Team Warner Campaign Manager

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbcc/53d9897e/5442680b/1c88513e/2654331662/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY1MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-turnoutefforts?refcode=20200714_f_1_nd__651__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbcc/53d9897e/5442680b/1c88513d/2654331662/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

name: Katie Porter
subject: Please do your part, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Trump will not be easy to beat, and he just spent $90 million on attack ads against Joe in battleground states. |
---
Peter -- I'm going to get straight to the point here: [I need you to donate $5 to Joe Biden's Presidential Campaign right now. Will you contribute?](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.11_B2_katieporter_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.11_B2_katieporter_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS") | [DONATE TO JOE BIDEN NOW >>](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.11_B2_katieporter_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.11_B2_katieporter_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS")
---
It was the honor of a lifetime to serve as a co-chair of my friend and mentor Elizabeth Warren's campaign for the White House. I worked my heart out in the primary for Elizabeth. And now I'm going to work my heart out to elect Joe. Let me explain why.

We simply can't afford to let Joe lose. Everything Elizabeth cares about, everything I care about, everything YOU care about, Peter -- it's all on the line.
* Joe knows who was hit the worst in this pandemic, and his plan to recharge our economy and make new jobs helps bring our communities back from the brink, and keeps them there.

* Joe will bring about real racial justice in this country, not only by defeating a man who fans the flames of hatred, but by being proactive in addressing systemic racism in our country.

* **Joe will always fight for us, because he knows us.** Joe and I have both served in Congress as single parents of young kids, struggling to juggle all the needs to raise and support our children while leading on issues that will bring the progressive change we need.

**But here 's the hard truth:** The General Election is in jeopardy. Trump will not be easy to beat, and he just spent $90 million on attack ads against Joe in battleground states.

**These early battleground state moves matter:** Remember, even if Democrats win the popular vote, we need to win in key places where Trump is on the airwaves to prevent another Electoral College loss.

It's going to take a lot of money for Joe to win this election. The primary was long and expensive, while Trump has spent three years building a war chest for the general election!

_If you want a Democrat in the White House -- a Democrat who will fight for progressive values -- I need you to dig deep today._

[**Please, Peter, donate $5 or more to Joe Biden right now. Together, we can beat Donald Trump, and yes, we can still bring big structural change to America. Donate now:**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.11_B2_katieporter_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.11_B2_katieporter_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS")

[**So I 'm asking you again, Peter. It's critical that we come together as Americans to defeat Donald Trump and elect Joe Biden this November. Please be generous. Everything we are fighting for is at stake.**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.11_B2_katieporter_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.11_B2_katieporter_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS")

No regrets,

Rep. Katie Porter

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfa5/1cd0ac28/8cd872d6/357c382f/3333882466/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfa5/1cd0ac28/8cd872d6/357c3832/3333882466/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfa5/1cd0ac28/8cd872d6/357c382d/3333882466/VEsEAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

You can support us by going to _[everysinglevote.com](https://click.everyaction.com/k/18253630/222389638/-1796372485?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgzMzY4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3NzQwZTgyLWZhYzUtZWExMS05YjA1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYmRhMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sOSjOjviBVWehUS6q1TVZtRgiP-n49HvJp4NnAD9uGU=&emci=22f01a7d-f8c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=87740e82-fac5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=7955580) _. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/18253631/222389639/-1038069371?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgzMzY4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3NzQwZTgyLWZhYzUtZWExMS05YjA1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYmRhMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sOSjOjviBVWehUS6q1TVZtRgiP-n49HvJp4NnAD9uGU=&emci=22f01a7d-f8c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=87740e82-fac5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=7955580)
We're** Every. Single. Vote.**
We **defend** voting as a _right. _
We **believe** no American should be forced to _risk their health_ in order to cast a ballot.
We **know** that the higher our country's democratic participation, the _better_.
That's why we want to make voting easier for _Every. Single. American. _
**[Will you join us in calling for a universal vote-by-mail option?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/18253632/222389640/-1503101814?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgzMzY4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3NzQwZTgyLWZhYzUtZWExMS05YjA1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYmRhMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sOSjOjviBVWehUS6q1TVZtRgiP-n49HvJp4NnAD9uGU=&emci=22f01a7d-f8c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=87740e82-fac5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=7955580)**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/18253633/222389641/-1503101814?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgzMzY4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3NzQwZTgyLWZhYzUtZWExMS05YjA1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYmRhMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sOSjOjviBVWehUS6q1TVZtRgiP-n49HvJp4NnAD9uGU=&emci=22f01a7d-f8c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=87740e82-fac5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=7955580)
In April, voters in Wisconsin were forced to choose between their health and their right to vote. We **cannot** let this happen on a nationwide scale in November.
The solution? _**A universal vote-by-mail option.**_

In all likelihood, we'll still be dealing with COVID-19 on November 3rd. To make sure Americans can safely vote from home, we're demanding Congress pass a universal vote-by-mail option _now_.

It's undemocratic to ask older and immunocompromised folks to risk their lives in overcrowded polling places on Election Day. Thankfully, we don't have to.

By securing a universal vote-by-mail option nationwide, every American will be able to exercise their democratic right _without_ potentially compromising their health. _Plus_ , vote-by-mail elections see higher turnout among younger voters, voters of color, and voters with lower overall household income levels.

**[Stand with Us | Tell Congress to pass a u niversal vote-by-mail option for the November 2020 election>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/18253634/222389642/-1503101814?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgzMzY4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3NzQwZTgyLWZhYzUtZWExMS05YjA1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYmRhMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sOSjOjviBVWehUS6q1TVZtRgiP-n49HvJp4NnAD9uGU=&emci=22f01a7d-f8c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=87740e82-fac5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=7955580)**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/18253635/222389643/-1503101814?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgzMzY4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3NzQwZTgyLWZhYzUtZWExMS05YjA1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYmRhMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sOSjOjviBVWehUS6q1TVZtRgiP-n49HvJp4NnAD9uGU=&emci=22f01a7d-f8c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=87740e82-fac5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=7955580)
Let's get to work,
\-- _Every. Single. Vote._

__

Every. Single. Vote. aims to make voting easier and more accessible by funding ballot initiatives to expand
vote-by-mail and automatic voter registration. Join us by visiting [everysinglevote.com](https://click.everyaction.com/k/18253636/222389644/1256577374?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgzMzY4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3NzQwZTgyLWZhYzUtZWExMS05YjA1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYmRhMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sOSjOjviBVWehUS6q1TVZtRgiP-n49HvJp4NnAD9uGU=&emci=22f01a7d-f8c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=87740e82-fac5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=7955580).

subject: This is Sid. Will you vote for Kathaleen TODAY?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
We need to send Kathaleen to DC to help President Trump | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/53d432f65a95/trump-announces-national-emergency-for-covid-12608846?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| | Hi friend,

As a friend of Kathaleen, I know that you are well aware of the assaults happening on our conservative values in every sector of our society.

The socialist Democrats will stop at NOTHING to continue trying to destroy our constitution and our way of life.

>From their complicit allowance of the terrorists rioting and destroying law and order across the U.S., to the blatant attempts to erase the history of our forefathers. From the attacks on the innocent unborn, to the irrational attempts for open borders, these extreme Democrats do NOT want to put America first.

**President Trump has been at the helm fighting the culture war, but the Democrats continue to try and thwart his work.**

President Trump **NEEDS** stalwart conservatives in Congress to keep making America great.

**I know Kathaleen Wall.** She is a woman whose faith and conservative values are the driving force behind all of her actions. She is a woman whose commitment to excellence is matched only by her dedication to preserving the constitution.

She is unafraid to call out corrupt governments like the Chinese Communist Party or even corrupt elected officials like Troy Nehls for ignoring sex trafficking in Fort Bend County.

**She needs your vote to go to Washington D.C. and help fight for our values. **

The polls are open until 7:00 p.m TODAY. Find your [polling location here](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=4bd8691596&e=01c99b7fbd).

**Will you go vote for her and ask your friends to vote for her TODAY? **

Together, you and I will keep Texas great and we will help President Trump keep America great.

God bless you,

Sid Miller
Texas Agriculture Commissioner

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Democrats Unveil Their Costly and Destructive Energy Plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Over the past few weeks the Democrat Party has made it crystal clear that they have no regard for or understanding of the energy industry that underpins the Houston economy.

Last week, Democrats in the House announced their climate change plan. This plan pushes for a carbon tax, introduces unreachable standards for energy producers and spends trillions of taxpayer dollars. It would drive energy prices up, increase taxes on every American and kill jobs in Houston and across the country.

Then, this week, Joe Biden's Climate Task Force led by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders announced their plan to combat climate change. This completely unrealistic plan calls for unachievable and disruptive goals, like installing 500 million solar panels in the next 5 years, in addition to seeking to eliminate the fossil fuel industry.

The bottom line with both of these proposals is that they would undermine the energy industry by mandating unattainable standards designed to score political points in Washington rather than protect hardworking Americans. This would spell disaster for an industry that employs millions of Americans, fuels America's economic progress and ingenuity, and has the potential to power America’s economic comeback from the current crisis.

Our Congresswoman remains silent on how these policies would devastate our community. She promised to be independent and represent us, but instead she dutifully supports Nancy Pelosi’s anti-energy agenda.

The city of Houston deserves better and the 7th Congressional District deserves better. I will not only vote 100% with our district in mind, but I will be an outspoken voice in support of Houston and our economy.

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

Last week, Democrats in the House announced their climate change plan. This plan pushes for a carbon tax, introduces unreachable standards for energy producers and spends trillions of taxpayer dollars. It would drive energy prices up, increase taxes on every American and kill jobs in Houston and across the country. Then, this week, Joe Biden's Climate Task Force led by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders announced their plan to combat climate change. This completely unrealistic plan calls for unachievable and disruptive goals, like installing 500 million solar panels in the next 5 years, in addition to seeking to eliminate the fossil fuel industry. The bottom line with both of these proposals is that they would undermine the energy industry by mandating unattainable standards designed to score political points in Washington rather than protect hardworking Americans. This would spell disaster for an industry that employs millions of Americans, fuels America's economic progress and ingenuity, and has the potential to power America’s economic comeback from the current crisis. Our Congresswoman remains silent on how these policies would devastate our community. She promised to be independent and represent us, but instead she dutifully supports Nancy Pelosi’s anti-energy agenda. The city of Houston deserves better and the 7th Congressional District deserves better. I will not only vote 100% with our district in mind, but I will be an outspoken voice in support of Houston and our economy. Sincerely, Wesley Hunt **** Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c915796611fe/terry-neese-announces-the-endorsement-of-former-edmond-city-mayor-saundra-naifeh-12313134?e=0604daec3e)

| |
---
| |
Friend --

I have BIG news... _**DAVID HILL HAS ENDORSED ME FOR CONGRESS!**_

Here’s what David had to say about why he and his wife Shannon are supporting my campaign:

_**“After a hard-fought primary campaign, my wife Shannon and I have decided to endorse Terry Neese for Congress, Oklahomans cannot afford more taxes, open borders, or the socialist agenda being peddled by left-wing Democrats. We need to defeat liberal Kendra Horn, fire Nancy Pelosi, and flip the House Red this Fall. Terry Neese is a pro-life, pro-gun, conservative, and she has our full support as she fights to beat Kendra Horn and deliver President Trump’s agenda.”**_

David is a man of integrity, a successful businessman, and a leader in our community -- and I am honored to have his endorsement.

Make no mistake: our campaign has all the momentum. But we need your help to get the word out about this major endorsement from David Hill.

[**Would you consider chipping in $25, $50, $100, or more right now to help us spread the good news? **](https://neeseforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67e5d68847a7afd74267bf651&id=68337da448&e=0604daec3e)

David knows how important it is for us to send a conservative outsider to Congress who will help President Trump put AMERICA FIRST. I know I have what it takes to beat Kendra Horn and get the results our district deserves -- _**and I will not let you down.**_

Team Neese is growing by the day, and I am so honored to have you on our side.

[**Now let’s go win this thing!**](https://neeseforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67e5d68847a7afd74267bf651&id=7e4520ea9d&e=0604daec3e) 6.2.6

name: Kat Cammack
subject: "Shall not be infringed"
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kiRpeHhigrKvNWXumFjArRksRfVe6Mz8wl-LJoP_iBaIarFj0xNaMzorDnSH4EmN7g8Vx_MdzIXe7jiq_EzNjyCbiyMqG088XXzuYWThzZdLguCdHGcoso6MO7KkTpIWRf8y2INhZvNmZ0M1l5sNBg==&c=z5o_t5kI4Hwz1Vz2i6JhPkP_GvMfHxTCMK4zQRB4d9tUWD_y7e9RxA==&ch=5joQGbnnGkc_0L6MS59ZhlcHMPzjxDJASThNEhuuMdNY6xEG-0AfXw==)
---
| | |
---
| Patriot,
Unlike the career politicians, the Second Amendment isn't just a talking point during an election for me.
It's personal.
Like you, I know that the Second Amendment isn't about hunting or sport. It isn't even about one's ability to protect one's self -- although I proudly carry every day to keep myself and my family safe. It is about the protection of our right to keep and bear arms for defense of life and liberty.
"Shall not be infringed" is as clear as our Founding Father's could get with how important this right is to us as Americans. That's why I am so passionate about protecting it.
---
| | | [Donate Today](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kiRpeHhigrKvNWXumFjArRksRfVe6Mz8wl-LJoP_iBaIarFj0xNaM6WTd3prhRYlr_Fcvse1osvdDAnHc3DH-Fn05s5YQG5LAci1URvEcHFzGoZ5-9X-65mNC7uCOqgKT95ANQ56xS5wiVqjf-aPW3sZ3dP143DmF8oDqwDFjN0=&c=z5o_t5kI4Hwz1Vz2i6JhPkP_GvMfHxTCMK4zQRB4d9tUWD_y7e9RxA==&ch=5joQGbnnGkc_0L6MS59ZhlcHMPzjxDJASThNEhuuMdNY6xEG-0AfXw==)
---
| And unlike others in this race, or most of those in the Washington swamp, I have put my words and beliefs into action long before I ever thought about running for Congress.
I serve on the Board of the Alachua County Friends of the NRA. I have been fighting for the Second Amendment here in our own community for many years, which is why I have been endorsed by more local leaders who are concerned are about our gun rights than anyone else running in FL-03.
Talk is cheap. If we are going to combat constant assaults from the socialists on the left as they systematically work to chip away at our rights, we must send leaders with principle, credibility, and experience.
You have my word that I will never cave to the left. I will always protect the Second Amendment and I will fight every single attempt to infringe on it.
However, I need your help so I can get to Congress and fight AOC, Ilhan Omar, and the socialists on this issue and many others.
[We desperately need more resources in the next 48 hours to help keep our ads on the air and our conservative message in front of voters.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kiRpeHhigrKvNWXumFjArRksRfVe6Mz8wl-LJoP_iBaIarFj0xNaMxrbEQ9CUbQ4jKrv31Zfc0n1KzFJdxIwaxBuquW7Ajy-CosfHyH2TOncE01RkErktfuwYaFuMl0QM_ODlAPyNxoUgFSIYDC4zqEhSOw4bImudDoBGomMqvM=&c=z5o_t5kI4Hwz1Vz2i6JhPkP_GvMfHxTCMK4zQRB4d9tUWD_y7e9RxA==&ch=5joQGbnnGkc_0L6MS59ZhlcHMPzjxDJASThNEhuuMdNY6xEG-0AfXw==)
The reality is that we need another $20,000 to hit our goal.
[Will you chip in whatever you can right away? With only a handful of weeks left until Election Day, it would mean a great deal to me and the issues we care deeply about.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kiRpeHhigrKvNWXumFjArRksRfVe6Mz8wl-LJoP_iBaIarFj0xNaMxrbEQ9CUbQ4jKrv31Zfc0n1KzFJdxIwaxBuquW7Ajy-CosfHyH2TOncE01RkErktfuwYaFuMl0QM_ODlAPyNxoUgFSIYDC4zqEhSOw4bImudDoBGomMqvM=&c=z5o_t5kI4Hwz1Vz2i6JhPkP_GvMfHxTCMK4zQRB4d9tUWD_y7e9RxA==&ch=5joQGbnnGkc_0L6MS59ZhlcHMPzjxDJASThNEhuuMdNY6xEG-0AfXw==)
In liberty,
---
|
---
| Kat Cammack Constitutional conservative candidate for Congress, FL-03

body:
I am so grateful to be able to share my story, and talk about how I went from waitressing at a Waffle House to passing laws in the South Carolina... | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/51c175f9a622/re-i-just-went-on-fox-news?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=9ebb83625d&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=1e65b14ecd&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| Friend,

_I went on Fox News this morning to talk about flipping the House and what we need to do to beat my opponent in November and win one of the top races in the country._

[](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=cbc08a1da6&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| [Watch and Donate](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=ac61bee171&e=f1831b4ca2 "Watch and Donate")
---
| | I was so grateful to be able to share my story, talk about how I went from waitressing at a Waffle House to passing laws in the South Carolina State House, and spread the word about how crucial winning SC-01 is to flipping the House.

_We need to restore leadership to SC-01 that will put the Lowcountry first. We need to fire Nancy Pelosi. We need to start getting it right in Washington so that our children can have the same chance at the American Dream that I did._

Friend, my race is one of the top races in the country. It’s a race that Republicans absolutely must win if we want to turn the House red in 2020.

**My opponent knows he’s vulnerable, and he is on the attack. His special interest allies even attacked me when my son and I had COVID.**

**But they’ve picked on the wrong woman.**

**[Help me fight back.](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=1473a24a9f&e=f1831b4ca2)**

We can’t afford to take a single day off — will you watch my interview on Fox News and chip in any amount to support my campaign?
---
| [Watch and Donate](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=f13f0a40a9&e=f1831b4ca2 "Watch and Donate")

| Thank you for your support,

| Nancy Mace

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Ballots drop on Friday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We have to be ready for what's to come.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8097%2E868730%2EkPwsh5) _We are going through great challenges and upheaval in both our country and our state. If you would prefer not to see campaign emails in your inbox right now,**[please click here to take a pause for a few weeks.](https://act.jayinslee.com/signup/snooze/?t=4&akid=8097%2E868730%2EkPwsh5)** Thanks, and take care._ Friend, I wanted to give you two big updates on the state of the race here in Washington: **On Friday** , ballots are mailed in Washington state for our primary election. Over 30 candidates are running against me, and **they aren't wasting any time going live with TV ads attacking me**. We can't waste any time, and we must be prepared to respond. This race is officially heating up, and voters will begin casting their ballots in a few days. That's why we set an aggressive deadline ahead of ballots being mailed out on Friday. We have to be ready for what's to come: **[We need to raise $50,000 by Friday at midnight to show our opponents we're ready for November, no matter what. Will you donate $5 or more right now to fund the general election fight ahead?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9640?t=5&akid=8097%2E868730%2EkPwsh5)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9641?t=6&akid=8097%2E868730%2EkPwsh5)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9642?t=7&akid=8097%2E868730%2EkPwsh5)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9643?t=8&akid=8097%2E868730%2EkPwsh5)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9644?t=9&akid=8097%2E868730%2EkPwsh5)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9645?t=10&akid=8097%2E868730%2EkPwsh5)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9640?t=11&akid=8097%2E868730%2EkPwsh5)
---
The election of Donald Trump in 2016 showed us anything is possible -- and that no election is certain. With just four Democratic governorships up for election this year, the Republican Governors Association has millions of dollars to spend and only a few places to spend it. Washington state will undoubtedly be one of them.
And you've seen the rhetoric around my pandemic leadership: My opponents are calling it "absolute idiocy," "beyond dumb," and "attacking us to death" for my role in making science-based decisions that are flattening the curve and keeping Washington state safe. I refuse to let these attacks deter me, but it's just a taste of what's to come with Election Day drawing near. This primary is really only the beginning -- and we have to be ready.
**[When ballots drop on Friday, we have to show our strength: We need to raise $50,000 by the end of this week. Will you donate $5 or more right now to show your support?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9640?t=12&akid=8097%2E868730%2EkPwsh5)**
Very truly yours,
Jay
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9640?t=13&akid=8097%2E868730%2EkPwsh5)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.jayinslee.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=8097%2E868730%2EkPwsh5). Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111
---
All content (C) 2020 JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D), All Rights Reserved

name: Amy Abbott (Finance Director)
subject: They tried to sell Susan’s vote to the highest bidder
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
You may have heard Susan's opponent will receive an additional $4 million after the primary election polls close tonight. I wanted to explain to you how this worked and why we have never seen anything like it in American politics.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI5NTAyNDES1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTA1MzM3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI5NTAyNDES1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTA1MzM3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)[****](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI5NTAyNDES1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTA1MzM3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Dear Peter,
You may have heard Susan's opponent will receive **an additional $4 million** after the primary election polls close tonight. I wanted to explain to you how this worked and why we have never seen anything like it in American politics.
Two years ago, the Far Left tried to buy Susan's vote during the confirmation of Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanuagh. They tried to bribe Susan into voting the way they wanted.
In the weeks leading up to the confirmation vote, many Far Left groups got together and conducted a smear campaign against Justice Kavanaugh. They leaked confidential documents and politicized the confirmation process in stunning ways. Knowing that Senator Collins would be a critical swing vote, they created a "CrowdPAC" fund. They asked people to contribute money to fund Susan's future opponent **if she voted for Justice Kavanaugh.** If she voted against him, the money would be refunded.
This fund -- now totaling over $4 MILLION dollars -- is to be awarded to the winner of the Maine democratic primary -- Susan's future opponent, TONIGHT.
No matter what you think of Justice Kavanaugh, this is not the way our democracy should work. **We do not "auction off" votes to the highest bidder.**
However, Susan stood her ground, ignored their threats, and did what was right -- as she always does.
At that moment, the Far Left got away with something unprecedented. Never before in American politics has a group attempted to bribe a US Senator in this way.
_While Susan refused to take that bribe, her opponent has no issue cashing in and taking every penny._
This is why Susan needs your help today. Please chip in to help her fight for what is right and to show the far left that votes are not for sale.
Thank you.
Amy Abbott
Finance Director
[DONATE TO SUSAN'S CAMPAIGN](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI5NTAyNDES1&kn=9&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTA1MzM3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
__
Paid for by Collins for Senator

name: Laura Loomer
subject: New Video: Voter Virus!
body:
We all knew this was coming . . .
| | |
Patriot,

We all knew this was coming . . .

. . . but many of our seniors and those with health issues did not, and **they’re being scared away from the voting booth by the Democrat’s “Voter Virus.”**

[**Watch our new ad then help us get it on the air:**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-383974-905161-5090823-084c2dc0e9-fab419de4c)

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-383974-905161-5090823-084c2dc0e9-fab419de4c)
Absentee ballots are rolling in and many voters aren’t aware of their vote-by-mail options. Here in Florida, **voters can get a mail-in-ballot up until the day before the Election!**

While election officials have protocols to safeguard the health of voters, there are many people in my District and around the nation who are being told to stay home on Election Day by Nancy Pelosi and her gang.

**And Democrats are only informing THEIR voters about mail-in-voting.**

The Democrats are using the Chinese Virus excuse to suppress Republican voters so they can steal the election.

[**Help me air this ad today and let’s show them that WE ARE NOT AFRAID!**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-383974-905161-5090823-084c2dc0e9-fab419de4c)

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: Need a Favor
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/need-a-favor?e=41f8e27552)
---
| |
---
| |
# The time has come!

Early voting starts tomorrow across Kansas. We’ve worked hard these past few months to get our message out to Kansans across our great state. Kansans across our state want a senator who stands up for We The People.

Now I have an important favor to ask. Can you remind your friends about the start of early voting? A quick post on social media that early voting is starting in Kansas or just mentioning in casual conversation. [Please share our Facebook page](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=6c0a201764&e=41f8e27552) on yours and that you plan to vote for Dave.

Also, do not forget to vote yourself. [Click here](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=f09a8084e5&e=41f8e27552) to find your polling place.

Thank you!

Dave

body:

| | Peter,

As we continue to navigate our new normal, it is imperative that we work together to eliminate the spread of COVID-19.

Scientists continue to prove that the most effective way to flatten the curve is to wear a mask when you’re not at home, stand at least six feet away from others, and continue to wash your hands.

[**_Will you stand with me in wearing your mask to protect yourself, your family, and your friends?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18255288/222424609/970277789?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjY1ZDIxYS0wOGM2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_sWPAI47wxFeIWjdSfZryraYQsk2UD6tSQTPK71qu2E=&emci=5165d21a-08c6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=5265d21a-08c6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=2678920)

With your help, we can reduce the risk of transmission just by committing to wear a mask whenever we leave our homes. If we all work together, we get the economy on the road to recovery quicker when everyone is healthy and we can redirect our resources.

[**_Sign on here and commit to protecting yourself and others by continuing to wear a mask →_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18255291/222424612/970277789?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjY1ZDIxYS0wOGM2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_sWPAI47wxFeIWjdSfZryraYQsk2UD6tSQTPK71qu2E=&emci=5165d21a-08c6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=5265d21a-08c6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=2678920)

body:
This election is about re-empowering our communities and the first step is to get input from folks like you. We’ll read your responses, incorporate your suggestions, and bring back resources to Kentucky.
---

For too long, politicians in our nation have worked for giant corporations and the wealthy elite. Meanwhile, they’ve left working families and everyday members of our community behind, unheard and forgotten. **Can you spare a moment to fill out our one-minute grassroots priorities survey?** | | [Take the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18255442/222431130/1978086714?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzFjZDI2Zi0wYWM2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0f-82sry6GQQjzxosIYNM5gRzt3QKmcxdGB0XorzafA=&emci=1b1cd26f-0ac6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=271cd26f-0ac6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=15601662)
---
Josh will represent the families and communities in Kentucky’s 6th district. He won’t be another politician in the pocket of wealthy donors. So, we’re reaching out to grassroots supporters like you for your input as we continue refining our campaign priorities ahead of the election in November.
With your help, we can flip KY-06 from red to blue, and change our politics to ensure no member of our community is left behind.
[**So please take just a moment to share your thoughts and priorities by filling out our 3 question grassroots survey.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18255443/222431131/900620427?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzFjZDI2Zi0wYWM2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0f-82sry6GQQjzxosIYNM5gRzt3QKmcxdGB0XorzafA=&emci=1b1cd26f-0ac6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=271cd26f-0ac6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=15601662)
**Josh is committed to representing our community in Congress and that starts with hearing your voice. We’ll read your responses, incorporate your suggestions, and together bring about the change that our Commonwealth and our country so desperately need.**
Thank you for your support,
Team Hicks

Josh Hicks for Congress

Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Ivanka Trump: College Isn’t the Only Job Path, ‘Find Something New’
body:
The Ad Council, Apple, the White House and other sponsors today are unveiling a new campaign urging potential job-seekers to ‘find something new | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fb7d412f7b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Ivanka Trump: College Isn’t the Only Job Path, ‘Find Something New’**

“In a new bid to kickstart the economy and steer younger Americans to good jobs that don’t require a $120,000 college degree, the Ad Council, Apple, the White House and other sponsors today are unveiling a new campaign urging potential job-seekers to ‘find something new,’” Paul Bedard writes in the _Washington Examiner_.

“Jobs are changing—and the Covid-19 has accelerated the pace,” says Ivanka Trump, who is co-chair of the White House’s American Workforce Policy Advisory Board.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=03fcf2dcf4&e=3ee4985eea)

**See the website** : [Find Something New launches today!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e1b941324b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The Trump administration imposed sanctions on several senior officials of the Chinese Communist Party . . . The rest of the world has been aware of the CCP's human rights abuses in Xinjiang since 2016, yet other than paying lip service, no other government nor the United Nation's Human Rights Council has taken any meaningful steps to address such abuses like the Trump administration has done,” Helen Raleigh writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f1bb373bcc&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “This virus has laid bare deeper inequalities in our health system and health outcomes that have too often been overlooked. To defeat COVID-19, we have developed a comprehensive response that tackles the drivers of these disparities and empowers Americans to protect themselves,” Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar and Surgeon General Dr. Jerome Adams write in [_The Dallas Morning News_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f32a2e9f40&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.dallasnews.com/opinion/commentary/2020/07/11/how-the-trump-administration-is-fighting-covid-19-in-communities-of-color/").
---
|
---
| “As an American lawman, I put my life on the line for strangers, friends, and loved ones every single day. President Trump sees me and recognizes mine and so many other’s sacrifices. He puts his money where his mouth is and America is a better place because of it,” writes Mark Cage, a sheriff in New Mexico, for the [_Carlsbad Current Argus_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=73643110bf&e=3ee4985eea).

**PHOTOS** : [President Trump hosts Americans saved by police officers](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=341e968aa6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a6c6748e2f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c7ecdec7a2&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=0eddeb095f)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Sam Ricketts, Evergreen Action
subject: BREAKING: Biden just released his new climate plan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Wow.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=1389%2E53494%2EuCTmjz) Friend, This is huge news: Joe Biden just released a new climate plan, and I'm thrilled to tell you that it includes _many_ of the policy recommendations we've been pushing for together. **[This is a big victory for Evergreen -- and with your help, it won't be our last. Donate to Evergreen Action today so we can continue to push Democrats to put bold climate action at the top of our national agenda.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/621?t=3&akid=1389%2E53494%2EuCTmjz)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/622?t=4&akid=1389%2E53494%2EuCTmjz)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/623?t=5&akid=1389%2E53494%2EuCTmjz)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/624?t=6&akid=1389%2E53494%2EuCTmjz)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/625?t=7&akid=1389%2E53494%2EuCTmjz)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/626?t=8&akid=1389%2E53494%2EuCTmjz)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/621?t=9&akid=1389%2E53494%2EuCTmjz)
---
I'm a policy guy, so I want to break down a few reasons why Vice President Biden's new climate plan is such a big deal:
* It calls for major new investments in a clean energy-led economic recovery -- just like we called for in our Evergreen Action Plan.
* It includes enforceable, sector-specific benchmarks to keep decarbonization on track as we move toward 100% clean energy -- like 100% clean electricity by 2035 and 100% net-zero energy commercial buildings by 2030.
* It holds polluters accountable for environmental injustice -- for example, by creating a White House environmental justice council, using community data to implement an Equity Screen on federal policy actions, and directing 40% of investments to support disadvantaged communities.

Biden didn't make these improvements to his climate plan on his own. This progress stems from months of advocacy -- from Jay Inslee and his policy team, from Evergreen Action, and from supporters like you who've continually raised your voice. You deserve enormous credit for this moment, as does Biden, of course, for his willingness to listen.
**[Let's keep the momentum going. Donate today to Evergreen Action so we can keep the pressure up on Democratic candidates all around the country these last four months before Election Day!](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/621?t=10&akid=1389%2E53494%2EuCTmjz)**
The Evergreen crew -- and that includes you! -- put a lot of work into making sure Biden's approach to the climate crisis is decisive and unapologetic. Change doesn't happen overnight, but with enough persistence, it does happen. Our work isn't done yet. I look forward to seeing what we accomplish together next.
With gratitude,
Sam Ricketts
Co-Founder, Evergreen Action
[CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/621?t=11&akid=1389%2E53494%2EuCTmjz)
---

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: Meet the latest Indivisible endorsed candidates!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
Join us on July 22nd via Zoom to support these great candidates from around the Country. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5ba493f0aca6/meet-the-latest-indivisible-endorsed-candidates?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
I am thrilled to invite you to join us on July 22nd for a Virtual Unity Event with 4 other candidates recently endorsed by Indivisible! We'll be joined by Ray Lenzi in IL-12, Jillian Freeland in CO-5, Robbie Goldstein in MA-8, and Cathy Kunkel from WV-2. I hope you'll join us and help support Democrats from all around the country!

All 5 of us are working as hard as we can to flip our seats and provide the voters of our districts with real representation. [**Click here to join us, and support 5 Democrats at one event!**](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=7b43de803d&e=140a9b81e7)

You'll get to hear from all the candidates with updates on their races, how they're fighting for our shared progressive values, and what it takes to run a grassroots-powered campaign. Having the support of a great organization like Indivisible means so much to all 5 of us, and**we know that with your support, we can all win in November.**

You'll have the opportunity to submit questions for the candidates to learn more about them and their campaign. **Join us on the 22nd from the comfort of your own home and get to know 5 Democrats who you can help send to Congress in January of 2021.**

I know I speak for all of the candidates when I say that your support means the world to us, and we hope to see you there!

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

subject: I need you right now
