| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18256320/222455589/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjAxMzc1YS0xNGM2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=THfWCp6-48sFOMhjsF2JOo_3_IvB0UQt2vl8ppON6-0=&emci=916d841a-09c6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=ff01375a-14c6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *
Hi friend,

For months, TX-22’s working families have had to endure a bitter, ugly primary between two candidates racing as far to the right as possible, showcasing how extreme the Republican Party has become and proving why their “leadership” will send Texas backwards.

**Troy Nehls** is a reckless Republican who was fired as a police officer for destroying evidence -- and he lied about his criminal record in a sworn affidavit. He’s managed to lead his primary by misleading voters while running a divisive and extremist campaign. | [Reject his message ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18256321/222455590/-1290848981?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.14_TS_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjAxMzc1YS0xNGM2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=THfWCp6-48sFOMhjsF2JOo_3_IvB0UQt2vl8ppON6-0=)
---

**Kathaleen Wall** is a GOP mega donor and Washington mouthpiece who’s poured over $14 million of her own money into racist ads in an attempt to buy this seat. Despite that, she’s still trailing Troy Nehls.
[Reject her message ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18256322/222455591/-1290848981?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.14_TS_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjAxMzc1YS0xNGM2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=THfWCp6-48sFOMhjsF2JOo_3_IvB0UQt2vl8ppON6-0=)
---

We don’t know who’ll win tonight. But **here’s what we do know: neither candidate will fight for the working families of our district, because they’re both focused only on furthering their own self interest.**

That’s why Sri is the best person to win this race: He’s focused on the issues that matter to our community, and he’s building the coalitions we need to win. Both Republican candidates have proven to be sycophants for the extreme agendas of special interests, and will work against health care protections for those with pre-existing conditions. **Sri will fight to expand health care coverage and ensure no one is left behind as we rebuild our economy.**

[**As soon as we have a primary opponent, we need to show them that the momentum is on our side. We’re up against an ambitious mid-month fundraising deadline that we’ve set to show our opponents that divisiveness and bigotry has no place in TX-22. Contribute now and help us reach that goal:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18256323/222455592/-2141433825?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.14_TS_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjAxMzc1YS0xNGM2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=THfWCp6-48sFOMhjsF2JOo_3_IvB0UQt2vl8ppON6-0=)

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: we're falling way short (need you now)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
---
| | Friend, I wouldn't email unless it were incredibly important, so believe me when I tell you:

**Kelly Loeffler 's shameful attacks on the Black Lives Matter movement are nothing more than an effort to sow division, keep Georgia's Senate seat red and protect Mitch McConnell's extremist majority.**
---
There's something happening in Georgia, and across the country. But both of my opponents - Sen. Loeffler and Rep. Collins - are extreme Republicans who are more concerned with their political future than the future of the next generation. What happens here in Georgia could decide which party controls the Senate, and with polls showing this race statistically tied, McConnell and the GOP have never been more vulnerable. But I need your help:
Loeffler is spending $20 million of her personal fortune to buy this seat, and McConnell-linked dark money groups are flooding this race with millions more. This could ruin our chance to take back the Senate for Democrats unless we raise another $6,019 by midnight tonight - and with just hours to go, we're still falling dangerously short.
**Here's the thing: If everyone reading this email chipped in even just a few dollars now, we'd hit our goal in minutes. But I know not everyone will, so I'm personally asking if I can count on you, friend:[Please, can you give $5 or more now to help us flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5f6/288179be/8585672/348e6879/3530023829/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNDQ3LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk447-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you for all that you do - I'm grateful for your support.

Raphael Warnock

name: Joe Biden
subject: Asking for $5. Please.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I could ask for your vote all day long, but asking for your donation is really one of the things I hate most about running for office. |
---
Peter, I could ask for your vote all day long, but asking for your donation is really one of the things I hate most about running for office.

**So, I 'm asking you for the chance to explain what your first $5 means to the campaign, and then if you're able, [I hope you'll decide to pitch in.](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.14_B1_jrb-mmd_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.14_B1_jrb-mmd_X__F1_S1_C1__full")** | [DONATE](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.14_B1_jrb-mmd_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.14_B1_jrb-mmd_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
---
Our fight to beat Donald Trump is going to be expensive. We're making a pitch for every vote across the country, and that includes some states where it costs a lot of money to get our message out in front of folks.

And we're up against Donald Trump and the Republicans' enormous fundraising machine -- and a war chest with over $290 million in it.

But, Peter, I'm not intimidated by how much money they have, because I know that, thanks to folks like you, we've got a fighting chance here. This grassroots team outraised Trump for the past two months in a row -- that's incredible.

And if we hit our new goal of 150,000 more online donations before midnight on Thursday, we'll have a good shot at outraising Trump's money machine again. That's why your first donation couldn't come at a more critical time, Peter.

[So, if you're able to pitch in, whether it's $5, $25, or more, will you give today? If every person who receives this email chips in what they can, we'll be on track to sending Trump a message that people power beats him any day of the week.](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.14_B1_jrb-mmd_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.14_B1_jrb-mmd_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfb8/1cd0ac28/8cf4416e/357c461d/1781510010/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfb8/1cd0ac28/8cf4416e/357c461c/1781510010/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfb8/1cd0ac28/8cf4416e/357c461b/1781510010/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfb8/1cd0ac28/8cf4416e/357c461a/1781510010/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfb8/1cd0ac28/8cf4416e/357c4619/1781510010/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfb8/1cd0ac28/8cf4416e/357c461c/1781510010/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfb8/1cd0ac28/8cf4416e/357c4617/1781510010/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

clean_body: I could ask for your vote all day long, but asking for your donation is really one of the things I hate most about running for office. | Peter, I could ask for your vote all day long, but asking for your donation is really one of the things I hate most about running for office. So, I 'm asking you for the chance to explain what your first $5 means to the campaign, and then if you're able, "" | "" Our fight to beat Donald Trump is going to be expensive. We're making a pitch for every vote across the country, and that includes some states where it costs a lot of money to get our message out in front of folks. And we're up against Donald Trump and the Republicans' enormous fundraising machine -- and a war chest with over $290 million in it. But, Peter, I'm not intimidated by how much money they have, because I know that, thanks to folks like you, we've got a fighting chance here. This grassroots team outraised Trump for the past two months in a row -- that's incredible. And if we hit our new goal of 150,000 more online donations before midnight on Thursday, we'll have a good shot at outraising Trump's money machine again. That's why your first donation couldn't come at a more critical time, Peter. "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" "" I'm so grateful for your support, Peter. Thanks for everything you do. Joe Biden | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: Tina Smith
subject: I’m at my wit’s end
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
This is a long email, but I hope you will take the time to read it. Republicans put the interests of the most powerful ahead of ordinary folks every second they remain in power. I have seen it happen time and again in some of the most insidious ways. From rushing through extremist right-wing judges and threatening to gut our health care system, to Trump fumbling the federal response to this ongoing crisis and slow-walking when it comes to helping those in need — the GOP agenda has hurt countless Americans. Look, I got into politics to fight for the issues that matter most to everyday families, like access to quality, affordable health care, good-paying jobs, protecting the right to vote, and building an economy that works for everyone. But it’s clear Republicans like Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and my opponent Jason Lewis have a very different set of values. I’m determined to keep Minnesota away from the GOP’s dangerous grasp. But if I’m honest, we have a very tough fight ahead of us. Republicans will do whatever it takes to flip Minnesota red and defeat me to hold onto their majority in Washington, so I’m asking for your help today: **If you’re financially able, please donate $10 or more to help us save Minnesota’s Senate seat. name: MJ Hegar
subject: Today's game plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Polls close at 7 PM, and we've got to make sure everyone gets out to vote by then.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890106/7f51f7bc/41edc26b/4ef66477/3068991079/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

Here's the deal -- today's the last day to vote, so if you're in Texas, and you haven't voted yet, make sure to go today! Tonight at 7 PM, the polls will close, and the runoff will officially be over. If you're still in line at that time, please stay there -- anyone in line before 7 PM must be allowed to vote! [**Click here for everything you'll need to cast your vote safely.**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890106/7f51f7bc/41edc26b/4ef66476/3068991079/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://mjfortexas.com/voting")

I want to thank everyone who has put their time, effort, and resources into supporting this campaign. What you've done has made a real difference in the future of Texas, and I'm confident that with your help, we will be able to defeat Sen. Cornyn in November. Tonight, after 7 PM, there's nothing more we can do to change the outcome of the runoff, but that's not to say our work is over.

While we'll get results from the in-person voting tonight, it might be some time before we have all the results from the absentee ballots. We may or may not not know who the nominee is this evening, but I want you to know one thing: I'm not going to stop working to defeat Sen. Cornyn.

I know we're all eager to find out the results and hit the ground running in the general election. For the next few hours let's keep our eye on the prize, get everyone to the polls, and keep working to flip this seat!

\-- MJ P.S. Today is Election Day! If you're in Texas, you can find everything you need to vote safely **[here.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890106/7f51f7bc/41edc26b/4ef66475/3068991079/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://mjfortexas.com/voting/")**

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890106/7f51f7bc/41edc26b/4ef66474/3068991079/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffday?refcode=email_20200714.2nd__1713__&amount=10")**
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890106/7f51f7bc/41edc26b/4ef6646b/3068991079/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1713&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890106/7f51f7bc/41edc26b/4ef6646a/3068991079/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

| | Paid for by MJ for Texas
---

| | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890106/7f51f7bc/41edc26b/4ef66469/3068991079/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/unsubscribe").

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: The Left’s plans for America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dZuPsv_tv12Jev4m5ziMBB7GiPle35PIw0ZAhjwSRUiOj7-zpPekZkd2vTuhyW4jgc2ekSTqbqWoIoBbt2tOdcCVn49VN5og7cIKx_-CwfQkV-nc8CUmfD1ihN-lr4MQFn03LP1oYrPzKK_dqY6Kd_IDV1m6XPEEKpxECsl4LqI=&c=SI15mkVrYVp66kr6Kn1vIox575cejUMbmUhrvszja4qYyfpXrnWG7Q==&ch=0NSTxoT4b_5nerV5hhERGD5Qj3tD0TPCaf7vGUIq50nUDp40iAHwOA==)
---
| Patriot,
Did you see the latest comments from the Democrat Party's "Squad" member, Ilhan Omar? She openly called for the "dismantling" of America's "economy and political system."
You can't make this stuff up. See for yourself:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dZuPsv_tv12Jev4m5ziMBB7GiPle35PIw0ZAhjwSRUiOj7-zpPekZkd2vTuhyW4jgc2ekSTqbqWoIoBbt2tOdcCVn49VN5og7cIKx_-CwfQkV-nc8CUmfD1ihN-lr4MQFn03LP1oYrPzKK_dqY6Kd_IDV1m6XPEEKpxECsl4LqI=&c=SI15mkVrYVp66kr6Kn1vIox575cejUMbmUhrvszja4qYyfpXrnWG7Q==&ch=0NSTxoT4b_5nerV5hhERGD5Qj3tD0TPCaf7vGUIq50nUDp40iAHwOA==)
---
| [Watch the video](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dZuPsv_tv12Jev4m5ziMBB7GiPle35PIw0ZAhjwSRUiOj7-zpPekZkd2vTuhyW4jgc2ekSTqbqWoIoBbt2tOdcCVn49VN5og7cIKx_-CwfQkV-nc8CUmfD1ihN-lr4MQFn03LP1oYrPzKK_dqY6Kd_IDV1m6XPEEKpxECsl4LqI=&c=SI15mkVrYVp66kr6Kn1vIox575cejUMbmUhrvszja4qYyfpXrnWG7Q==&ch=0NSTxoT4b_5nerV5hhERGD5Qj3tD0TPCaf7vGUIq50nUDp40iAHwOA==)
The Democrats aren't even trying to hide their true intentions anymore. They are determined to tear down the institutions that make our country great, demonize our patriotism, and "cancel" anyone that doesn't agree with their radical views.

name: Defeat Disinfo
subject: Mission Accomplished
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0wrDB7MtwPLuSSi4jwn1dr2AEKKvrxXLDWyyWUDJ9fIh3cA_yNrSXYaQXjbaKQCTUlofLJ4kmaD8hMQQrIvoxrfFVwq_P1_jqnJRrojYnzMTksM-0Bif1n0R3wNlb4guS_vDj5ZW2N51-MAOpakb54lSXLw3nq9MuYh9w2Cx7owsDR4-rrguzaId_aPGTQwwSTZJIuyqu-oUzYBGoFcji2f4Goas7REY-40whpHP8HvzEH7ZBfyygX7aL0czGVVzeQ/33g/YGYWUJhgQxKZrZlMVkwfag/h0/8BALtLFiH8bkRhWfAtuZ0JwPDXZwgQb_XHd7v0a91rs) Team —

Donald Trump is using America’s mortality numbers to boast. While touting the success of his pandemic response, he claimed our mortality rate was the “lowest in the world” — a designation, he notes, that the “lamestream media” voluntarily ignores.

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0n5Qb5xjaWQ-ETscSkvkipr0z-tXS-YzTqrn3xkEeo8tjnvyxb0G6tXaqg4O4ylHofZlsv9LUOctDUdPXzzSWXo-5efS-4qOrULz2fz9tyWlNeZU7yZU3IWez7h2kdZz983te67g0V5Ohxy8KRhDAv_0SW0eLiW6Xi4hfTnmxOH7wpB3PMn6ykKGVmt6KgjjkyRzyCVY7qt7jdjKqmHSSy3BKivReg29ynruwmyikuYD5gV9b9Nrpp1xue3YZuZx1A/33g/YGYWUJhgQxKZrZlMVkwfag/h1/dhI9TsM4jmcj8FeIFRjEi00hlkfRrb1up9hHRR24IPk) We **_could_** tell you that, of the twenty countries hardest hit by COVID-19, America holds the 7th highest case-to-fatality ratio and 2nd highest rate of mortality per 100,000 people.

We **_could_** direct you to the source of this data, Johns Hopkins University, which has served as a leading authority on COVID-19 data since the outset of this pandemic.*

But instead of doing those things, we’d rather show you a story behind the statistics — _a story that doesn't sound like “Mission Accomplished”._

**[While Trump says “we are doing well,” this is what’s happening on the ground. For this week’s action, share Isaiah’s story with your Facebook network to illustrate the reality of this pandemic.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJjY49n83ivj1JpSpcqTpqm-bvAVMdpAbnvMG98yHiy0oKzIg87RG4bORgZTk6GxhwQtrjtpKXuyOw-aNHS112Rs6T0VAu1zAYk6L0K9oEmHdDzrfMY7sDCL5q9CmLYLV0swk8_86u6ySxqRgWK1nef5NR2JdcxeuM_P731-65qWlFGE17rA6szevyYZ9P2RQKIE3lryU4qjfsfo0mfVoy1rI6tbbeY34bDQGmMYbsKoHx8gSxi-Bw0DBDEYxOFOfxaWcr0ObmYR8i2tCAveVZ_/33g/YGYWUJhgQxKZrZlMVkwfag/h2/HnjWXYB8uv6JzA9xvLPEyBGpqeEnlYR1a07q9d_L440)**

[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJjY49n83ivj1JpSpcqTpqm-bvAVMdpAbnvMG98yHiy0i1eYPM989-2sQxxbwRmy3gmtGeoe_Ba2mKoX-2P4FkXZiIv8YOSag_T8g_MEEuo98XZB8vKsn6SmtzTVcz_oVPOZ_Gw6zBqIdvWLuEKC75RxVsLQC4_QA08uiQIQzJaLohTRnuLtaB8qr1Lv1mWlPU-Tt0AlQs7HNt8NwLauZQBkr6q3uUWI-JwROXR_kqljNRGGJ0-XY_alkt2fqcyhZ9m9ukKkXagalwGyFu1XL9T/33g/YGYWUJhgQxKZrZlMVkwfag/h3/jYUXsmQO1PBKqUX0bixuF6ly6u5_r5THjt2xnA_qW2k) **[These are the victims, and their stories, behind Trump’s “Mission Accomplished.” When you take this week’s action, you’ll show voters across the country that Isaiah and so many like him are more than numbers.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJjY49n83ivj1JpSpcqTpqm-bvAVMdpAbnvMG98yHiy0rIhRq5BiYsFgkMpPYHhFzOGWnbphxj5AHM_V1ggr-KyyAQg6MsHEvgBWulNj58VndmfRzR1gd1ybBwsoB8-hix65lfoy930LikaJ6E4msSoeNQThhqeqsB7QCUvd4AVhVZCR14A7ESM4zfHcrCLDz-o1omfXJ4ikpSgaD22VHBLHcscWXdHWUnB8RL_kGkYNaAx6RdGvIGaJ6xDdYp9AOjfI_Xuq9IFMPDVdC7zRBZf/33g/YGYWUJhgQxKZrZlMVkwfag/h4/22bQdkVvyXiEMzmLBN9qimOHhFJouSAjBAHhBBvmrIM)**

clean_body: | | | Team — Donald Trump is using America’s mortality numbers to boast. While touting the success of his pandemic response, he claimed our mortality rate was the “lowest in the world” — a designation, he notes, that the “lamestream media” voluntarily ignores. We could tell you that, of the twenty countries hardest hit by COVID-19, America holds the 7th highest case-to-fatality ratio and 2nd highest rate of mortality per 100,000 people. We could direct you to the source of this data, Johns Hopkins University, which has served as a leading authority on COVID-19 data since the outset of this pandemic. But instead of doing those things, we’d rather show you a story behind the statistics — a story that doesn't sound like “Mission Accomplished”. The Defeat Disinfo Team P.S. Trump will protect his second term before he protects American lives, If you were forwarded this email, you can subscribe to receive these weekly action updates on how to fight Trump's lies. | | Sent via . Did you see this? **Mike’s historic race to become the next U.S. Senator from Mississippi was highlighted again in a great article from _The Root._** It tells the story of how when Mike first ran for Senate in the 2018 special election, he didn’t have the same financial resources, staff, or operation that we have now – and he _still_ came closer to winning than anyone thought a Democrat could. Just like Stacey Abrams did in Georgia, we’re challenging the idea that Democrats can’t be viable in “red” Southern states. Last month, Mike attended the Black Lives Matter protests in Jackson with his sons, while our opponent Hyde-Smith has built a reputation for her comments about public hangings, jokes about voter suppression, and dressing up in confederate outfits. She’s been practically silent on the issue of Mississippi changing its state flag or removing confederate statues representing our state in the U.S. Capitol. name: Maria & Nicole
subject: Do you know what socialism really looks like?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress |
body:
It is the complete economic dismantling of a country all while power is concentrated and placed in the hands of a few corrupt elites. [ ](http://links.mariaelvirasalazar.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=a1e7211fb2f7437191fc0a69ae63f5c8&_e=X7QiM_QbqpoTAE3UVa5Pb2iHPD0QIiuNirHHlBBru9pjOkWxkxGkIKQ14xk1_QlN4oNnWC8gMTK6WVuDFPZfVnrBto_dOu2kpNp42GXYznz8xAyJXvHq9SePzqhJC2SrqH7l6naToP-veNRLiwVl2LdJNhl8mR-BEjGTJyD5OdL9oKjKpqki510ie9ywkTGx0x372NHNa-C9AKN6XhnnFgzTUgXZ5EcQhua02eshyAYVXzGihqjmYQu5P14zkKDSOFip49UORbeb82gfAI4qns6Y1lp11J9-S2gEaxtkpTWDuLPmKbRUJfJroFMpuODDNDzwFPXfGI3OznYSz8F--4fwFtyLCHpCdQ0xK6MSX5voyq9eZgw_oPauGlr-NjOuybYfwQJbTABQHdCjTOfYoo2x_WKiybdIMk0Kvxc3SinircvEN9dM3Zi17mxnulCr) Peter, _Do you know what socialism really looks like?_
We do.
**It is the complete economic dismantling of a country all while power is concentrated and placed in the hands of a few corrupt elites. **
**Look no further than what happened to Cuba and Venezuela!**
No one knows or understands that horrible truth better than us - we’re Maria Elvira Salazar and Nicole Malliotakis.
We are both proud 1st Generation Americans, Republican candidates for Congress [Maria] in Florida and [Nicole] in New York, and the daughters of Cuban refugees.
Maria’s mother and father escaped Cuba with just $5 in their pockets before the Castro regime could imprison them, or _**worse**_!
Nicole’s mother fled Cuba as a child, forced to leave behind her father, who stayed to protect the family business... which ultimately was taken by the _**TYRANNICAL**_ government along with their childhood home.
Our families have seen firsthand the horrors of socialism. The _**DESPAIR**_ , _**DESTRUCTION**_ , and _**DEATH** _that happens when you take freedom away from people and concentrate power in a few corrupt leaders.
And we’re running for Congress because we absolutely cannot let the terror that our parents escaped come to the United States of America.
If you think that couldn’t possibly happen here, think again. Self-proclaimed socialists like Alexandria Ocasio Cortez are consolidating power in Congress. **More and more radical socialists are winning seats with AOC’s backing and working to turn America into another Cuba or Venezuela. **
These radical socialists can't be reasoned with; they hate America and everything for which it stands. Their goal is to overthrow our current system of government. **That's why the only option to save this country from socialism is to give these socialists a complete and stunning defeat this November.[But we must have your support to stop the socialist path our country is hurtling towards.](http://links.mariaelvirasalazar.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=a1e7211fb2f7437191fc0a69ae63f5c8&_e=X7QiM_QbqpoTAE3UVa5Pb2iHPD0QIiuNirHHlBBru9pjOkWxkxGkIKQ14xk1_QlN4oNnWC8gMTK6WVuDFPZfVnrBto_dOu2kpNp42GXYznz8xAyJXvHq9SePzqhJC2SrqH7l6naToP-veNRLiwVl2LdJNhl8mR-BEjGTJyD5OdL9oKjKpqki510ie9ywkTGx0x372NHNa-C9AKN6XhnnFjvk38YBWrPhWz4ua6zjxxVmNAYXYFAtvyK911eHZZ4Xbq0dTJ-SNPJADdYu9joXSF78rybEJ0n3-pF4aXJZzqgnx9jogsnhEocskccvQhQOGAorT_DUQjsPKCH46Uaaqzhaw-oWWI33-T1P4Q95So4hcO3xi19t8dI2-mwOxlspEa8nUKVhBZweQ3JeZDCdqPItnmO5bEd_P3aGLaasXYD2SKuINRz_koyIsuaP23VA)**
We’re running for Congress, to tell the truth about the dangerous socialist policies pushed by radicals like AOC and Ilhan Omar and fight back against their plan to destroy America.
We aren’t exaggerating, _**“undoing America”**_ is literally what they publicly say they want to do.
We won’t stop fighting because giving up would be telling our parents that their hard work giving us a better life was a waste, that they should have just surrendered to socialism in Cuba. And that’s never going to happen.
Help us fight back - before it’s too late. **[We’re working together to raise $10,000 by midnight, help us reach our goal before AOC raises taxes and puts that money toward making government elitists richer.](http://links.mariaelvirasalazar.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=a1e7211fb2f7437191fc0a69ae63f5c8&_e=X7QiM_QbqpoTAE3UVa5Pb2iHPD0QIiuNirHHlBBru9pjOkWxkxGkIKQ14xk1_QlN4oNnWC8gMTK6WVuDFPZfVnrBto_dOu2kpNp42GXYznz8xAyJXvHq9SePzqhJC2SrqH7l6naToP-veNRLiwVl2LdJNhl8mR-BEjGTJyD5OdL9oKjKpqki510ie9ywkTGx0x372NHNa-C9AKN6XhnnFiu9AGGCqKssDqAS7jYN0TBzA0DzHvXaOOmMuMAK-denhzBqUdI_7J08WEtAO_NMgTqqb3rydUEGk5u84TsILU5nbJsKrMi1oxPIDKWhOXPgWxp1sU1fpJgFel8AlUFgs_1bnYYtaPsZrFEM7xM4nCQkCJrGU-Lw7ASSfHOlLzDeeGJFy7Un4-GGOX3KqogLyEE3HWcKnrTXnUGRJT6PwMn2HiQFA7P3ID3ZNhT2PTzv)**
We’re counting on you, and we won’t let you down.
Thank you, Maria Elvira Salzar & Nicole Malliotakis | |

name: Team Christy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Hey Peter,

We'll get to the point. Christy has a big deadline coming up, and we need to help her out.

We have to raise **$17,000** by midnight on Thursday so Christy can file her candidate statement -- yes, they really cost this much! Making sure Christy's statement is on the official county voter guides _that go to every voter_ is one of the best ways to make sure voters know about Christy before they cast their ballots in November.

Mike Garcia might have a long list of corporate PACs and special-interest donors that can write a single check to fund his candidate statement fee, but Christy relies on grassroots contributions from folks like you. **In fact, Team Christy's average online grassroots donation is just $22.44.**

**[We simply won't raise the money we need to file Christy's candidate statement unless our strongest supporters (like you) step up and chip in. friend,

We told you last month — we restarted our grassroots fundraising campaign, and we can’t afford to take our foot off the gas.

**That’s why we’re inviting you to join the One Indiana Club.**
[**Join the One Indiana Club**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=e134dbbb28df45e886f8419256cb9833&_e=AoodQrqr_xANoOLOt5ewpg8N0eMUstCN0VFHv_rpUUJsX5m-BT8ZNmsSnS-O5yZXU3iMFhdvX9MltuBuKNdNJLGXEcBn6u8GJX_lbAu8zPXml6pd4PRp4rfM7SbDy8ihJvpz5oUV0UXu1oqNAy5NfQlqlfQkd2L2ylHumhS2kfRMFz9FHXQXU36sReN_v9SNlG6nqFnhgMZ1v8Daj0rnJVS4qW4FV-64CGgqWtwuNcBVZ4oeemRtOYKPN3w_VD2QkpGzBqxDBrtNqt0wMbXl1tYaJcvq8izJ8QFcrYuKcuAMLd8Ndj15qdyzycfMdG1KUrX7DKJ19xFR3NsrC6DrrYk_v5fLtNZ3c2NwrcWNa7h1yUeLHlJa_66Kjtfv9XZZoGLF3nU6ExHxhI3otbbptbVX18m1dOcV7C8ECUMBlzkB3Qhb-mSLsdbabOtyIv-cF4zE7xe9B_eBs22TmPrSzCtWV_uognlTvRi8r3lxspQ%3D)
The One Indiana Club is a select group of grassroots donors who we’re going to rely on every step of the way from today until Election Day. Grassroots donors like you help us pay for ads, yard signs, t-shirts, travel — you name it.

_We could not run this campaign without you and that’s a fact. _

Getting 100 Hoosiers to join our new club before July 18 would help us pick up where we left off and make sure that Eric can continue to build One Indiana for another four years.

friend, will you be one of the 100 grassroots donors who join our One Indiana Club?
[**Join the One Indiana Club**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=e134dbbb28df45e886f8419256cb9833&_e=AoodQrqr_xANoOLOt5ewpg8N0eMUstCN0VFHv_rpUUJsX5m-BT8ZNmsSnS-O5yZXU3iMFhdvX9MltuBuKNdNJLGXEcBn6u8GJX_lbAu8zPXml6pd4PRp4rfM7SbDy8ihJvpz5oUV0UXu1oqNAy5NfQlqlfQkd2L2ylHumhS2kfRMFz9FHXQXU36sReN_v9SNlG6nqFnhgMZ1v8Daj0rnJVS4qW4FV-64CGgqWtwuNcBVZ4oeemRtOYKPN3w_VD2QkpGzBqxDBrtNqt0wMbXl1hg2O3hW-GbgREQplOeOiNcVJ5lxj94UWgwsX8sL7t942p7UokB3A2Hcs8RLucY-h5Q0enOZ7IzJxpY1zParfaO9wUAXEOccZMYs4keCDT3EdQK8oIzUM0OiVXg1brW1kk49PpqdKaOQkP3vtyek-McuTl7sRSde2xjEji_lHhrxPQLGxBKWtQcskdqx-QEt8WeaCg83mhdvLco1-bVem8Y%3D)

Your Holcomb Crew

subject: Watch LIVE at 5 p.m. ET: President Trump holds a press conference
body:
Tune in live at 5 p.m. ET as President Donald J. Trump holds a press conference from the White House Rose Garden. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c1e2f24871&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • July 14, 2020
---
| | |
# **LIVE: President Trump holds a press conference**

**Tune in live** at 5 p.m. ET as President Donald J. Trump holds a press conference from the White House Rose Garden.

[Watch live at 5 p.m. ET!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e93d37e6de&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Ivanka Trump: An expensive college degree is not the only path**

**Ivanka Trump** joined a virtual roundtable this morning with IBM Executive Chairman Ginni Rometty and Apple CEO Tim Cook, where the three discussed today’s launch of the groundbreaking “Find Something New” campaign.

**“To invest in our future** , we have to invest in people, in education, and the many paths to a well-paying job or starting a new business,” Cook said.

**Find Something New** is a joint effort from the nonprofit Ad Council, IBM, Apple, the White House, and a coalition of business partners. The campaign provides resources to inspire and empower Americans in achieving career success—particularly those who choose not to follow traditional pathways such as attending a four-year college.

**Several Americans** from across the country joined today’s roundtable, sharing their positive experiences in using these alternate pathways to find opportunities.

🎬 [WATCH: Americans of all ages can ‘Find Something New’](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5ec5340a7e&e=3ee4985eea)

**The campaign** is another important project resulting from President Trump’s Pledge to America’s Workers, which has seen 16,367,850 new opportunities created for the U.S. labor force since its launch in the summer of 2018.

**As the job market** shifts because of new challenges from the global Coronavirus pandemic, it is vital that American workers have the tools they need to adapt—including online learning, certification programs, and expanded apprenticeship opportunities.

**The Find Something New campaign** will help men and women across the country gain the skills and training they need to start—or restart—a thriving career.

[WATCH: Ivanka Trump discusses Find Something New campaign](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=687dde140e&e=3ee4985eea)

**See the website** : [Visit FindSomethingNew.org!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=22c19124c9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

---

Friend -- **Fighting corruption is Jon Ossoff's job.**

Jon runs a business that investigates bribery, organized crime, and war crimes for news organizations worldwide. They've exposed corrupt officials, corporate abuses, contract killers, ISIS war crimes, and human traffickers.

**Jon will bring that fight to the halls of Congress as the next Senator from Georgia.**

_We need anti-corruption reformers in Washington now more than ever, friend._

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Healthy children
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
I'm not going to beat around the bush: we are behind in immunizations, and we need to catch up. We've seen concerning drops in childhood immunizations, lead screenings and child wellness visits over the last several months. I know that you might be worried about bringing your child to a doctor's office right now. That's why the Rhode Island chapter of the American Academy of Pediatrics put together [this video](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZXx1es6J_j4MhhflfIYtCd9AqyOytuMvPPedS2gO7PgchCtXWmt9Mv8jct-uyzck4V0X9dc1Dg1IYXIxv3bwLNJJ8xCIcDY3RkQl5VkTQTnRfNz7PrcE5OtRTHBwdF0BECMgclaC0d7K4qszkLSfFQF1uVftLilVZEHGiab9Voc=&c=6Z99-KZGoA4fr49tSRCwYXGSWKpqHTvaAg8aJFU09La2IMmukuBwvA==&ch=ngc9A5PoDTghEQoFx1ryR2VctQqdbWdefish9RoZI5odpLS-onwc3w==) about how they've prepared to keep your children safe while giving them the vital care they need:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZXx1es6J_j4MhhflfIYtCd9AqyOytuMvPPedS2gO7PgchCtXWmt9Mv8jct-uyzckMDrSrGTc6MHkxXCYrx5N5TxZTwRrCw8CBZ__Txb8WY3AA1QmcTlYhiwWKJhw2S-gVWtef6gTVMIswK1mB2LA9O43LTgdDFC_HH-7zhn1kbxcCUxOEnATPQ==&c=6Z99-KZGoA4fr49tSRCwYXGSWKpqHTvaAg8aJFU09La2IMmukuBwvA==&ch=ngc9A5PoDTghEQoFx1ryR2VctQqdbWdefish9RoZI5odpLS-onwc3w==)
---
| You should know that our pediatricians are taking extreme caution - keeping waiting rooms clear, using PPE, conducting infection control, and requiring screenings. These protections are specifically designed to mitigate risk of exposure to the virus. The bigger concern at this point is not going. And if you or your child are currently uninsured, you can reach out to our health insurance exchange, at 1-855-840-4774 to learn more about coverage. Let's make sure our kids don't fall behind.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZXx1es6J_j4MhhflfIYtCd9AqyOytuMvPPedS2gO7PgchCtXWmt9Mgsls6hLL6oDL4BeVzIuncwNv62gzhF7vJsJ6TyFn-1Ik9IMPG7v0yioBB7jVECTjW5p0CX9KMTLik1HhNNuY83ko9lb3PMRj9m0TRShiYpiTDu9MgRQFdSeP_1jszd3EeWGve2MtQuako6ddfGR67o=&c=6Z99-KZGoA4fr49tSRCwYXGSWKpqHTvaAg8aJFU09La2IMmukuBwvA==&ch=ngc9A5PoDTghEQoFx1ryR2VctQqdbWdefish9RoZI5odpLS-onwc3w==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZXx1es6J_j4MhhflfIYtCd9AqyOytuMvPPedS2gO7PgchCtXWmt9Mgsls6hLL6oDL4BeVzIuncwNv62gzhF7vJsJ6TyFn-1Ik9IMPG7v0yioBB7jVECTjW5p0CX9KMTLik1HhNNuY83ko9lb3PMRj9m0TRShiYpiTDu9MgRQFdSeP_1jszd3EeWGve2MtQuako6ddfGR67o=&c=6Z99-KZGoA4fr49tSRCwYXGSWKpqHTvaAg8aJFU09La2IMmukuBwvA==&ch=ngc9A5PoDTghEQoFx1ryR2VctQqdbWdefish9RoZI5odpLS-onwc3w==).
---
| I'll be back on the air tomorrow afternoon at 1 p.m. to give an update on the state's COVID-19 response.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZXx1es6J_j4MhhflfIYtCd9AqyOytuMvPPedS2gO7PgchCtXWmt9Mv8jct-uyzckFbEea1XdSWVw4bcHt2otj7L4M2bp66yWrO0ejhaykzE1pne3BUqlCHbCDbJPC--Ylx1Oa_5t-gv0QGh2sO7LmgUW1XftBqwMc_sWnvBP09ZYJpccTTfQnI8gA9PLS9X845oX9JLm3liV3wOAdwTE6qS9-Lwy9C8ksS8FxAuUVHk59eVGxb-DXVyDXBQQaYNK10tbKL73t5wzW02_T2_GWLK7hNp_NQEuNykrLoSTmSsrQjPFbR-iXGcAJu-rj60d8bpj3muOV90glWkXh1733Uk5TMoZjWknEN9seR8CEGihlXMLwLFzzbupFnAnLph89T8fTlZOVQIcew8U-MlWX2Z5kQ4reNpxJ0tbl3k_89uKeYT2a-1oh39P5ehWv-Z6&c=6Z99-KZGoA4fr49tSRCwYXGSWKpqHTvaAg8aJFU09La2IMmukuBwvA==&ch=ngc9A5PoDTghEQoFx1ryR2VctQqdbWdefish9RoZI5odpLS-onwc3w==).

We're all in this together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov in collaboration with |

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: Checking In
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
I’m running to be your next Representative for the 7th Congressional District. As a businesswoman, I understand first hand the heavy burden of excessive taxes and regulations that crush small businesses and innovation. That is what compelled me to get involved in politics and is what leads me to the position I’m seeking now - fighting for Pennsylvania taxpayers and small businesses. [ ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=d2cdeecd82434e02b4511c68bb0e9582&_e=rQEVbGoAzsmb3SfUBoGcPbtULtPmvLYOVZBA2GjPoAt2cz25fuIWLgsJuh7LBwGAJ1KJDXkTZzcVVC75oGsPVbo7T4ljoBjpGU-6Z1JeJrF4tc4-zuaKPrbEtRDDswACKB9VFkeMcbBdISbFJyo3zdoSfXLD7rQgy15gk-zO5aFvuKsWibPJNE2x4s9Iou4T83P-4v9-xiDTKuUZcN00JLxAWj2LGzP9l2IwxXWKjnnpfeYZWmWIesTpaP_kBf0Sj2tvDB7J0DKIEZ-Qa_nszOR3K_hv7pItA50CQ_FaUe4gvVOuYv4GD9R-1cpDgYNk5xPvozitgpfbKggX49z_QZvZ5e-rZIoC6Fl3C-roHh4lWtuREJf1QzZIPeFv5GPo4NU9exs-4cOHIBXO8U3Zf46Y0yW6OrfYfnJMM1WTOknNISShKgdvkZDxPCf9ogwTPJ8rNQGmX-iQeTRFPmE8cQ%3D%3D) I am a businesswoman, not a politician, and I am running to clean up the mess in Washington and defend the American dream. The American dream is why my grandparents came here more than 100 years ago. They were in search of equality of opportunity, personal liberty, and trust in the wisdom of the common person. As a mother of two beautiful children, I want for them and for all of our children what we were so blessed to have; life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.
As a business owner, I have employed 150 hard-working Pennsylvanians that manufacture goods here in Pennsylvania that are exported around the world. That real-world experience will ensure that I’m keeping your best interests in mind in every vote I cast.
I understand the hardships people are going through. I want to be a voice for the people here in PA07. I understand what it means to be a part of the middle class and the challenges that Pennsylvanians face. I also know what it's like to struggle and need support. We can change this. We WILL change this. But only with your help. Join me and we will rebuild the economy and bring jobs back to Pennsylvania. Let’s clean up the mess in Washington D.C. will you join me in the fight? [**Donate**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=d2cdeecd82434e02b4511c68bb0e9582&_e=rQEVbGoAzsmb3SfUBoGcPbtULtPmvLYOVZBA2GjPoAt2cz25fuIWLgsJuh7LBwGAJ1KJDXkTZzcVVC75oGsPVbo7T4ljoBjpGU-6Z1JeJrF4tc4-zuaKPrbEtRDDswACKB9VFkeMcbBdISbFJyo3zdoSfXLD7rQgy15gk-zO5aFvuKsWibPJNE2x4s9Iou4T83P-4v9-xiDTKuUZcN00JDU1JYpcbeN2GtpIRaF3Wg0DuZQX7B9y5EnRaFV5gXqkFsPcnQBkCfM6CTBFF3LqeQ7lfbpJYMzH_Z4X1-TWTVnNrjUfn0JRZLUpxTgfesFwVyA-EOo_IRfGbM-dyI5XTXRDViAX_mJtjNapS4JMxejLXbvG3UvOr2vJo1SWwWIucH4Qw1Fr5sojtaF4NXPl6rGJdwPz7Hs9NbyHBrwbdymDO6rKut3QqJny9eQayza1g_cNKk5SDCogsFImpfrj3Q%3D%3D) Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc. [Unsubscribe](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_s=d2cdeecd82434e02b4511c68bb0e9582&_t=XT6v8rEK363NI2XDak-Mm4h7T-kBuDH45hiw6S2p9GG9SUyR2VTVHBerVcJvovjfwMMIW9UWXBlKUYukFzWW1gGs59SdAaGESeIV23dgoLwbfAnMsalJpLXG2PlD_s25WH-pGjF9t95RGfRPmL9I2JEj2D5jCWzmmKofP1_jrZ4%3D)

name: Joe Biden
subject: announcing my plan to create millions of infrastructure and clean energy jobs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We'll make historic investments. |
---
Peter --

I said it last week, and I'll say it again: in the face of today's economic crisis, it won't be enough to build back to the way things were before COVID-19. We have to _build back better._

**That 's why today I'm announcing my plan to create millions of infrastructure and clean energy jobs to build a resilient and sustainable infrastructure now -- and deliver an equitable clean energy future.**

My new plan will create high-paying jobs that provide a choice to join a union. These will be jobs that improve air quality for our children, increase the comfort of our homes, and make our businesses more competitive. We'll make sure the communities who have suffered the most from pollution are first to benefit. And throughout every aspect of my plan, I'll prioritize addressing historic environmental injustice. I'll explain more in a moment, but first I have to ask:

[**Peter, as we take steps to create millions of infrastructure and clean energy jobs, one thing I know is I 'll need input from folks like you to make my plan a reality. Will you take a quick survey and commit to meaningful action today? **](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfcb/1cd0ac28/8c3c5292/357c4023/1704477239/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-clean-energy-policy?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.14_B2_cleanenergy_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.14_B2_cleanenergy_X__F1_S1_C1__ac") | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfcb/1cd0ac28/8c3c5292/357c4022/1704477239/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-clean-energy-policy?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.14_B2_cleanenergy_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.14_B2_cleanenergy_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
---
Here's how we'll make historic investments -- in just my first term -- to create millions of good, union jobs, build a modern and sustainable infrastructure, and set us on an accelerated and irreversible course to meet the ambitious climate progress that science demands:
* **Building and upgrading a cleaner, safer modern infrastructure.** We'll build and improve smart roads, water systems, municipal transit networks, schools, airports, rail, ferries, and universal broadband access for all Americans, whether they live in rural or urban areas of America.

* **Positioning the American Auto Industry to Win the 21st Century.** Eleven years ago, Barack and I helped save the auto industry. Trump has overseen a manufacturing recession and has allowed China to race ahead in the competition to lead the auto industry of the future. I'll reverse this trend, make the United States a global electric vehicle leader, and create 1 million new jobs in and relating to the American auto industry.

* **Constructing homes and public housing units and upgrading buildings to be more energy efficient.** These retrofits won't just create jobs, they will make the places we live and work healthier and reduce electricity bills for families and businesses. I'll ensure these homes are energy efficient from the start -- saving the families who live there $500 per year. And, these retrofits will create at least 1 million construction, engineering, and manufacturing jobs.

* **Move ambitiously to generate clean, American-made electricity to achieve a carbon pollution-free power sector by 2035.** This will enable us to meet the existential threat of climate change while creating millions of jobs with a choice to join a union.

We can get all this done, Peter. And we can do it fast. But we can only do it together.

I need your help to send a clear message that we reject Donald Trump's failed leadership and that we're ready to lead the world in clean job creation.

**Will you take a quick supporter survey and help me get the word out? I need you to help me by taking meaningful action today:**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfcb/1cd0ac28/8c3c5292/357c4022/1704477239/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-clean-energy-policy?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.14_B2_cleanenergy_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.14_B2_cleanenergy_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
---
Thank you,

Joe Biden
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfcb/1cd0ac28/8c3c5292/357c4021/1704477239/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfcb/1cd0ac28/8c3c5292/357c4020/1704477239/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfcb/1cd0ac28/8c3c5292/357c401f/1704477239/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfcb/1cd0ac28/8c3c5292/357c401e/1704477239/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfcb/1cd0ac28/8c3c5292/357c401d/1704477239/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfcb/1cd0ac28/8c3c5292/357c401c/1704477239/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfcb/1cd0ac28/8c3c5292/357c401b/1704477239/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfcb/1cd0ac28/8c3c5292/357c401a/1704477239/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfcb/1cd0ac28/8c3c5292/357c4019/1704477239/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfcb/1cd0ac28/8c3c5292/357c4018/1704477239/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfcb/1cd0ac28/8c3c5292/357c401b/1704477239/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfcb/1cd0ac28/8c3c5292/357c4017/1704477239/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfcb/1cd0ac28/8c3c5292/357c401a/1704477239/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bfcb/1cd0ac28/8c3c5292/357c4016/1704477239/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: Matt Mayberry
subject: force them to live with it:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Mayberry for Congress P
body:
| Derek-- For far too long, Congress and federal bureaucrats have done NOTHING to improve healthcare for the brave men and women who served in our Armed Forces.

As a veteran, I know just how absolutely broken this system really is – and it's one of the top reasons I got into this race to begin with. Just a few years ago, 300,000 veterans died waiting for VA healthcare. That's both tragic and wholly unacceptable. And while my opponent is raising money from the same Swamp that got us in this situation, we have to grow our Rapid Response War Chest to fight back. _**[Can you help out? Here's the secure contribution link](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDY1NDAyNDA1NzEyNTY1Njg1JmM9bzdkMCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNzA4NTM5MTcmZD1oN2owYTFw.pmrw3ow1dmssac4YxsXUKmpfmiPZM3LMtov8P0D4xhE)**_

The fact is Congress won’t act to fix the Veterans Administration until we force them, which is why I unveiled my plan last week that would force members of Congress to receive their healthcare through the VA system. My general election opponent has had his chance to fix this and failed. My primary opponent is just another bureaucrat. Neither of my opponents served, and neither has any idea how the VA actually works. Help me fix the broken system -- please stand with me.

Thank you,

-Matt Mayberry
Candidate for US Congress[ _

| | **" 'Historic moment': Gov. Lee signs hotly debated heartbeat bill"
\- WBIR Channel 10** [_**Chip in to fight back ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0ca/18d6a294/4c87f413/26d7f58f/1700764846/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MTQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200714?refcode=jme200714_m_other&refcode2=107423") Yesterday, Governor Lee signed one of the most restrictive abortion bans in the entire country into law, outlawing abortion after six weeks -- before most women even know they're pregnant. **Tennessee 's gerrymandered supermajority and Gov. Lee's latest attack on women's access to health care -- during a pandemic -- is wrong. It's dangerous. And it's unconstitutional.** [_**As your next U.S. Senator, I 'll continue my decades-long fight to protect women's rights. Are you with me? If you are and if you're able please chip in a few dollars today.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0ca/18d6a294/4c87f413/26d7f58f/1700764846/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MTQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200714?refcode=jme200714_m_other&refcode2=107423") The future of reproductive freedom could depend on this race and**I 'm so proud that Planned Parenthood and NARAL** **have endorsed me** as the best candidate to protect women's health care and flipTennessee's open U.S. Senate seat. But fighting for Tennessee women will take a full team effort, especially because my opponent**Bill Hagerty, has repeatedly vowed to back bills like the one Gov. Lee just signed into law and pledged to confirm extremists judges who will continue attacking choice.** [_**We can 't let him become a Senator. If you can, chip in right now ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0ca/18d6a294/4c87f413/26d7f58f/1700764846/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MTQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200714?refcode=jme200714_m_other&refcode2=107423") | | | [Donate](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0ca/18d6a294/4c87f413/26d7f58f/1700764846/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MTQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200714?refcode=jme200714_m_other&refcode2=107423")
---
Hagerty believes him standing between a woman and her doctor is exactly where he should be. That's why he doesn't belong in the U.S Senate.
**I want to raise my daughters in a state, and a country, where women are free to make their own health care decisions and their Constitutional rights aren 't under constant attack.**
[_**I 'm relying on grassroots supporters like you so I can take our fight to protect the individual freedoms of ALL Tennesseans to the Senate. If you're able, make a contribution today.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0ca/18d6a294/4c87f413/26d7f58f/1700764846/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MTQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200714?refcode=jme200714_m_other&refcode2=107423")
In service,
James

body:
Debate tonight starting at 6:30. | | | |
---
| | | Friends,

In 30 minutes the first and only televised debate for Republican candidates in the 2nd district congressional race will be live across the district! Tune in to see exactly what Jake stands for and why he will do a great job of representing our Kansas values in D.C.

It will be airing tonight on the following stations:
**KSNT/KTKA/KTMJ** , Channel 27 (Topeka)
**KSNF/KODE** , Channel 12 (Pittsburg)
**WDAF** , streaming on [fox4kc.com](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=4d5371b805&e=1050d051da) (Leavenworth/Kansas City)

The **August 4th Primary** is almost here. We have** exactly 3 weeks** to ensure we elect a Conservative who will **keep the 2nd district red.**

With early voting starting tomorrow, it is critical that we get the message to voters that Jake is the the best choice for protecting this seat from being lost to the Democrats. We cannot do this alone. [Will you pitch in to help make sure we don't lose another seat in Kansas to the Democrats?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=ae03a93ca5&e=1050d051da)

| Jake LaTurner has spent his entire adult life **serving Kansas and carrying out a Conservative agenda**. Kansas needs _sincere public service_ from people who share our values and interests. It's time to send a Conservative that the 2nd District can trust to bring our values to Washington.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Our AG nominee...Todd Rokita
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
We are excited to announce our party's nominee for attorney general, Todd Rokita! We would like to thank our delegates, state committee members... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/delegates-have-we-received-your-ballot-469510?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b852de853a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Hoosier Republicans,

It's now official \-- Todd Rokita rounds out the statewide Republican team as our nominee for attorney general!

We would like to thank the delegates, state committee members and all county chairs who worked hard to be part of an unconventional convention in an unconventional year.

**Chairman Kyle Hupfer and Todd Rokita have an important message for you in this[video](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=87f737d3f9&e=1acd9bb3d6) above. [Check it out and SHARE it with your friends, family and neighbors!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=47492e1406&e=1acd9bb3d6)**

We're working hard to earn victory for our entire Republican team this November -- **Governor Eric Holcomb, Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch and Attorney General ****nominee**** Todd Rokita**! We couldn't be more proud to support them, and they've got the entire united party apparatus behind them! [**\-- > Click here to watch Chairman Hupfer and Todd Rokita <\--**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=432e41702e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
As Todd says, the stakes couldn't be higher in this election, and we must keep the attorney general's office in conservative Republican hands. With your continued support, we will be victorious in November!
Thanks,
-Your Indiana Republican Party

---
| [Watch: Chairman Hupfer Introduces Todd Rokita](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2e241859b0&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Watch: Chairman Hupfer Introduces Todd Rokita")
